creator: george@m5p.com
text: It's much too early for me to state a conclusion like this with complete assurance, but subjectively, my "make buildworld" with dnetc_idprio="31" seems to be going just about as slowly on my SCHED_ULE kernel as without dnetc_idprio="31", and I did verify with "idprio <pid>" that the dnetc processes are in fact running with idprio 31.
